official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing and encoding the Play clientbound set_player_inventory empty ItemStack fixture.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and set_player_inventory packet id.

field_notes.item: Empty ItemStack fixture only. Official ItemStack optional codec writes VarInt count 0, avoiding item registry and component patch bytes.
field_notes.slot: Primitive slot fixture only; does not prove player inventory state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_player_inventory packet framing and dispatch/decode for one slot plus ItemStack.EMPTY only; do not infer non-empty ItemStack, item registry, component patch, player inventory state, or client-load completion.
